title: Big Buck Bunny
description: A large and lovable rabbit deals with three tiny bullies in this Blender Foundation animated short film.

title: Sintel
description: A lonely young woman searches for her pet dragon in a fantasy world full of danger. Third Blender Open Movie.

title: Tears of Steel
description: In an apocalyptic future, a group of warriors and scientists must prevent destruction by robots. Blender Foundation's first live-action/VFX open movie.

title: Elephants Dream
description: Two figures explore a bizarre mechanical world in this pioneering open-source animated short — the first Blender Open Movie.

title: Spring
description: A young shepherd girl and her dog discover the power that connects all living things in this poetic Blender animated short.

title: Sprite Fright
description: A group of teens encounter mushroom creatures in the forests of Britain in this spooky Blender animated comedy-horror short.

title: Agent 327: Operation Barbershop
description: Secret agent 327 enters a barbershop where nothing is as it seems, in this animated short produced by Blender Animation Studio.

title: Night of the Living Dead
description: George A. Romero's groundbreaking 1968 horror film about a group of people trapped in a farmhouse besieged by reanimated corpses.

title: Metropolis
description: Fritz Lang's 1927 expressionist science-fiction masterpiece depicting a futuristic dystopian city with stark class divides.

title: City Lights
description: Charlie Chaplin's 1931 romantic comedy about the Tramp's love for a blind flower girl, widely considered one of the greatest films ever made.

title: The Phantom Carriage
description: Victor Sjöström's 1921 Swedish silent masterpiece about a drunkard who encounters the driver of Death's carriage on New Year's Eve.
attribution: Victor Sjöström / Svensk Filmindustri — Library of Congress

title: ISS Earth Time-Lapse 4K
description: Breathtaking 4K time-lapse footage of Earth from the International Space Station, showing city lights, auroras, and weather patterns.
